map.title: Map
map.warnTiles: Gaode tiles failed: try switching A/B/C.
map.panelNote: Note: in-page polyline is straight; follow navigation app for actual route.
map.storageNote: Data stored in WGS84; converted to GCJ‑02 for Gaode rendering.

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.hero: Cardiac arrest: call for help and start chest compressions immediately
emergency.steps1Text: Ensure safety, check responsiveness & breathing. Call for help and emergency services.
emergency.steps2Text: Hands interlocked on the center of the chest, 100–120/min, 5–6 cm depth.
emergency.steps3Text: Attach electrodes, follow voice/screen prompts, stand clear for shock.
emergency.steps4Text: Continue compressions; do not pause too long to search equipment. Someone fetch AED nearby.
emergency.note: Note: Metronome supports vibration and BPM adjustment for demo; follow professional guidance in real cases.
